Calculates and fills summary statistics in the first 7 rows of the ResultsTable.

cancelCurrentTask() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.PreprocessingPanel
Cancels the currently running SwingWorker (preview or apply), if it exists.

Action on pressing the "Cancel" button, shuts down the current BatchWorker.

Checks if 2 given images have the same dimensions.
checkSameDisplayRange(ImagePlus, ImagePlus) - Static method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.tests.unit.Utils
Checks if 2 given images have the same display range (min/max values).
checkSamePixels(ImagePlus, ImagePlus) - Static method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.tests.unit.Utils
Checks if 2 given images have the same pixels across all slices.

Checks that actual contains at least expected numerical datas.

Deep copy of each slice's pixel array at the time of the last snapshot, used as the clean baseline for non-destructive previews.

Creates a SwingWorker, that take care of processing and showing the measurements preview.
createMeasuresPreviewWorker(ImagePlus) - Method in interface fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model.LDCService
Create a SwingWorker, that take care of processing the preview of the selected measured parameters, it returns the preview as an image showing outlines of detected particles.

Create a SwingWorker, that take care of processing measurements and returning them, if executed.

Creates a JRadioButton, registers it in the ButtonGroup, adds it to this panel, and wires its action listener to MorphologyPanel.handleSelectionChange().
createSectionDivider(String) - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.MorphologyPanel
Creates a flat section divider: a label with a horizontal line to its right.
createThresholdControl(String, int, int, boolean) - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ThresholdingPanel
Builds a labeled threshold control row containing a JSlider and a JSpinner, synchronized with each other and bound to the min or max threshold value.

Helper to create standardized vertical panels with a titled border.

Helper to transform an existing JPanel into a container of standardized vertical panels with a titled border.
